titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Mo Willems Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff, Annalise Hennessey

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 12257724.
This collection contains 3 published digital objects. And those objects are comprised of 6 digital files.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday December 27, 2023 at 04:01

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: In Chinese, Dutch, Flemish, English, French, Italian, Japanese, Korean, and Persian.

did.abstract: The collection includes writings, artwork, photographs, audiovisual material, electronic media, a drawing table, correspondence, personal papers, and other papers by or relating to Mo Willems.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.
Box 10 (digital media): Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Boxes 133-148 (audiovisual media): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 149 (computer media): Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Cumberland Rare Books on the Jockey Hollow Fund, 2013, 2017.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two groupings: July 2013 Acquisition and February 2017 Acquisition.

bioghist.head: Mo Willems (1968- )
bioghist.p: Mo Willems is an American author, illustrator, and animator. After graduating from New York University in 1990, he began a job with Children's Television Workshop. This position led to Willems writing for Sesame Street , resulting in six Emmy Awards. In the early 2000s, he began working for Nickelodeon and Cartoon Network, developing shows such as Codename: Kids Next Door , The Off-Beats , and Sheep in the Big City . In addition to children's television, he has written and illustrated comic books for DC Comics and more than 50 children's books. Willems is the creator of popular books such as Don't Let the Pigeon Drive the Bus! , Knuffle Bunny: A Cautionary Tale , and the Elephant and Piggie series.

Willems' books have been translated into several languages and developed into theatrical musical productions. In addition to three Caldecott Honor awards for Don't Let the Pigeon Drive the Bus! , Knuffle Bunny: A Cautionary Tale , and Knuffle Bunny Too: A Case of Mistaken Identity , Willems has been awarded the Carnegie Medal for animated shorts based on Knuffle Bunny: A Cautionary Tale and Don't Let the Pigeon Drive the Bus!

In 1997, Willems married Cheryl Camp, a production manager for children's commercials, in Brooklyn, New York. The couple had one child, Trix Willems. In 2019, Willems was named the Kennedy Center's first education artist-in-residence.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Mo Willems Papers. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes material created by Mo Willems throughout his career as an animator, illustrator, and author. Materials include writings, artwork, photographs, audiovisual material, electronic media, a drawing table, character merchandise, correspondence and fan mail, including a crocheted pigeon gifted to Willems, personal papers, and other papers by or relating to Willems. Writings contain drafts, notes, notebooks, proofs, scripts, and related printed material, including foreign language editions of Willems' children's books and single issues of comic books and magazines. Artwork includes original watercolors, acrylic paintings, sketchbooks, pencil drawings, animation cels, inks, and sketches.

Children's books in the collection include the Elephant and Piggie series, Edwina: The Dinosaur Who Didn't Know She Was Extinct , the Knuffle Bunny series, Leonardo the Terrible , and the Pigeon series. Animated works by Willems include Codename: Kids Next Door , The Man Who Yelled , The Off-Beats , various Sesame Street shorts, and Sheep in the Big City .

custodhist.head: Custodial History
custodhist.p: Previously on deposit at the Thomas J. Dodd Research Center, University of Connecticut.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into four series: I. Writings and artwork, 1999-2013, II. Sketchbooks and notebooks, 1990-2013, III. Merchandise, circa 2000s, IV. Electronic media.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Cumberland Rare Books on the Jockey Hollow Fund, 2013.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes dummies for Elephant and Piggy! - I am Invited to a Party! (2007), Elephant and Piggy - A Big Guy Took My Ball (2013), Elephant and Piggy - Today I will Fly! (2007), Elephant and Piggy - Can I Play Too (2010), Walter, and The Little Bad Wolf and other early comics (circa 2001) and story boards for Sheep in the Big City (1999-2001) and Time to Say "Please"! (2005).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes proofs, drafts, or artwork for Elephant and Piggie - I Am Invited to a Party! (2007), Leonard, the Terrible Monster (2005), Time To Pee! (2003), and Time To Say "Please"! (2005).

did.unittitle: Knuffle Bunny: A Cautionary Musical, binder with working draft, annotated in manuscript, and extensive notes
Sketchbook, printed ephemera, and photograph of Willems pushing Trixie on a book cart at ALA
"An image a day, vol. II" travel sketchbook
"An image a day, volume III" travel sketchbook

descriptivenote.p: "An image a day, volume III" travel sketchbook

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes stuffed animals, a t-shirt, pajamas, sheep toys, and keychain.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.physdesc: 3.46 Gigabytes. This reflects the size of the carrier media, but may not accurately reflect the extent of digital files available for research.
2.04 Gigabytes. This reflects the size of the carrier media, but may not accurately reflect the extent of digital files available for research.

did.unittitle: I Am Invited to a Party! Printer Files
did.physdesc: 211.78 Megabytes. This reflects the size of the carrier media, but may not accurately reflect the extent of digital files available for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This acquisition consists of writings, artwork, photographs, electronic media, audiovisual media, printed material, a drawing table, and other papers by or relating to Mo Willems. Writings include drafts, notes, scripts, and proofs of materials documenting Willems' career as an animator, author, and illustrator.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into seven series: I. Writings and Artwork, 1981-2011. II. Merchandise, 1993-2010. III. Correspondence, 1981-2009. IV. Personal Papers, 1968-2010. V. Drawing Table, circa 1987. VI. Printed Material, 1962-2011. VII. Audiovisual and Computer Media, 1988-2006.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains drafts, notes, sketches, paintings, and other materials relating to Willems' work as an animator, author, and illustrator.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into four subseries: Children's Television Programs, Children's Books, Early Works, and Other Artwork.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries includes drafts, notes, pencil sketches, storyboards, scripts, animation cels, and other materials for animated and live action productions in which Willems was involved.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by program and file title therein.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries includes drafts, notes, pencil sketches, watercolor paintings, unbound proofs, storyboards, book event papers, and other materials for children's books by Willems.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries includes comics, scripts, and pitches from early in Willems' career, as well as drafts, scripts, and other materials relating to Sterile Yak, his NYU comedy troupe.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by title or file title.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries includes pencil sketches, drafts, watercolor paintings, storyboards, and other materials relating to other artwork and published sketchbooks by Willems.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by title or file title.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Features several sketches drawn by Mo Willems.

title.part: You Can Never Find a Rickshaw When It Monsoons: The World On One Cartoon A Day

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series includes character t-shirts, one sweatshirt, character toys for Sheep in the Big City , various stickers and collectors cards, activity kits, a Pigeon pencil case, and other character merchandise.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains four Sheep in the Big City Subway Restaurants meal toys, one Sheep plush, one Pigeon pencil case, and one Pigeon keychain.

did.unittitle: Sheep in the Big City Australian premiere bag
Sheep in the Big City and Elephant and Piggie series t-shirts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains one Elephant and Piggie t-shirt and two Sheep in the Big City t-shirts.

did.unittitle: Sheep in the Big City Sweatshirt

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains one Sheep in the Big City sweatshirt.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains letters from Willems' colleagues, friends and family, event correspondence, and fan mail.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two subseries: Personal and Professional Correspondence and Fan Mail.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains correspondence from Willems' colleagues, friends, and family, including his parents Casey and Constance Willems, Gail Gladstone, Brenda Overturf, and Linda Simensky, as well as event correspondence and a thank you note from Barack and Michelle Obama.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by correspondent with unidentified correspondence filed at the end of the sequence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains letters, cards, and fan creations from children and other fans of Willems' work. Included is a crocheted pigeon accessory gifted to Willems.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series includes Willems' award certificates and nominations, CV, photographs, and other personal papers.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains Mo Willems' personal drawing table.

did.unittitle: Drawing table with inset light box

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The drawing table has a circular "Animation Disc" light box set into the drawing surface. A photocopy of a picture of Mo Willems at the desk circa 1987 is taped to the desk. The desk measures 2' 7" wide by 1' 9" deep by 3' 8" high.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series includes magazines, clippings, and published books by or about Mo Willems, books by other authors, and posters.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged into three subseries: Books, Comics and Magazines, and Oversize Print Material.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries includes published copies of Willems' books in various foreign languages and books by other authors.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by author or title.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains magazines, articles, and comic books including works by or about Willems.

did.unittitle: Time "Global Pattern of the Red Offensive" world map

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series includes audiovisual and computer media by or relating to Mo Willems.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged into two subseries: Audiovisual Media and Computer Media.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries includes audiocassettes, film reels, and videocassettes of animated shorts, episodes of animated series, and interviews.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged under two subheadings: Video Recordings and Audiocassettes. Within subheadings, materials are arranged alphabetically by title or file title.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries includes CD-ROMs, one floppy disc, one DVD, and one Gameboy Advanced videogame cartridge.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
